FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Release
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Just a version bump for the Steam Workshop release.

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Road Toggling
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Minor change to the road-building integration.

patchNoteLines.li: Adds a gizmo to Outposts to let the player toggle whether or not they are included in Empire's road builder
Outposts from VOE:Power Grid can now only link to settlements that are within its transmission range
